headline: Jack Henry Announces Regular Quarterly Dividend
summary: Jack Henry & Associates, Inc. (NASDAQ: JKHY) today announced its Board of Directors maintained its quarterly cash dividend of $.61 per share. The cash dividend on its common stock, par value $.01 per share, is payable on June 19, 2026, to stockholders of record as of June 1, 2026. Jack Henry has paid consecutive quarterly dividends since 1991, and 2025 marked the 22nd consecutive year of an increasing dividend.
